allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-fireflies: Requires a hermetic Fireflies MCP/post-tool harness with external credentials and transcript fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-gong-sync: Requires a hermetic Gong MCP/post-tool harness with external credentials and recording fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-task-runb: Depends on multi-hook Agent and TaskCompleted chain state; pending a dedicated compliance chain harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-win-loss-: Relies on cross-hook assessment artifacts and calibration fixtures that are not yet isolated.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-fireflies-: Credentialed Fireflies API preflight still needs a service-stub harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-gong-api-c: Credentialed Gong API preflight still needs a service-stub harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/session-start-: Touches git/worktree state and needs an isolated repository fixture to test safely.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-gtm-planning/hooks/post-t: Telemetry hook writes GTM planning artifacts and needs isolated cycle fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-okrs/hooks/post-task-okr-: Telemetry hook writes OKR artifacts and needs isolated cycle fixtures.

plugins/opspal-core/hooks/task-graph-pol.description: Must have at least one test asserting exit 2 or 3 (production escalation or forbidden block)

plugins/opspal-salesforce/hooks/pre-depl.description: Must have at least one test asserting direct deploy block outside agent context

plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-tool-use-c.description: Must have at least one test asserting routing enforcement block

allowPatterns: Allows read-only sf data query on production org
Allows read-only sfdx data query on production org
blockPatterns: Escalates sf project deploy on production org
Escalates sf data delete on production org
plugins/opspal-core/hooks/task-graph-pol.description: Must test both read-only allow paths and mutating escalation paths.

allowPatterns: Allows read-only tools while routing requirement is pending
Allows read-only Salesforce MCP tools while routing requirement is pending
Allows read-only Marketo MCP tools while routing requirement is pending
blockPatterns: Pending routing state should deny operational direct execution
Bypasses mandatory routing when agent_type marks sub-agent context
plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-tool-use-c.description: Must test read-safe allow behavior and blocking/deny behavior for operational paths.

allowPatterns: Allows read-like HubSpot search POST requests
blockPatterns: Denies mutating HubSpot CRM curl requests in main context
plugins/opspal-hubspot/hooks/pre-bash-hu.description: Must test read-only HubSpot curl allow paths and mutating deny paths.

blockPatterns: Denies mutating Marketo bulk curl requests in main context
Denies smart campaign execution curl requests in main context
plugins/opspal-marketo/hooks/pre-bash-ma.description: Must test read-only Marketo curl allow paths and mutating deny paths.

plugins/opspal-core/hooks/task-graph-pol.description: Must exercise explicit production detection and enforcement messaging.

requiredPatterns: Denies unvalidated sub-agent context when agent_type alone does not satisfy routing
plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-tool-use-c.description: Must explicitly test that unvalidated sub-agent context is denied and cleared capability-matched sub-agents are allowed.

requiredPatterns: Approved agent context should not be re-blocked
plugins/opspal-hubspot/hooks/pre-bash-hu.description: Must verify HubSpot direct API guards do not re-block specialist agent execution.

requiredPatterns: Approved agent context should not be re-blocked
plugins/opspal-marketo/hooks/pre-bash-ma.description: Must verify Marketo direct API guards do not re-block specialist agent execution.
